titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Human Ecology Advisory council records23-21-2794
titlestmt.author: Compiled by College of Human Ecology Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:16:55 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02794New York State College of Human Ecology Advisory council records23-21-2794Compiled by College of Human Ecology StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
March 20032B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
humecThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:26:30 UTC.12/07/2018

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Human Ecology Advisory council records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Advisory Council
23-21-2794
2.7 cubic feet. 2.7 cubic feet.
1931-2005. Minutes, correspondence, biographical information, and published reports. Minutes, correspondence, biographical information, and annual reports of the Advisory Council. Collection material in English 2635165
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
College of Human Ecology Staff
Date completed:
March 2003
EAD encoding:
Justine C. Rosa, March 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, March 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Minutes, correspondence, biographical information, and annual reports of the Advisory Council.
SERIES LIST
Series I. 1930-1939 Box 1- Folder 1
Series II. 1940-1949 Box 1- Folders 1,2
Series III. 1950-1959 Box 1- Folders 2-8, 23
Series IV. 1960-1969 Box 1- Folders 8-18, 24-33, 35, 36; Box 2- Folders 1,2
Series V. 1970-1979 Box 1- Folders 18-20, 33, 34, 36, 37, 39-41; Box 2- Folders 3-7
Series VI. 1980-1989 Box 1- Folders 20-22, 37-40; Box 4- Folders 1-6
Series VII. 1990-1999 Box 4- Folders 5-13; Box 5- Folders 1-11
Series VIII. 2000-2010 Box 6- Folders 1-4
Series IX. Advisory Council Members Box 3
Cite As:
New York State College of Human Ecology Advisory Council records, #23-21-2794. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cornell University New York State College of Home Economics
